message:
fix(sync): increment active waiter count when notify waker slot is re-filled

When a Notified future is re-polled and its waker slot is None (after
being previously consumed), filling it must increment waiters.active to
keep the bookkeeping consistent. Without this, the active count drifts
low, potentially causing missed notifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
